root.name: Change background color of slide 1 to light blue
root.description: Evaluates whether the agent successfully changed the background color of the first slide to light blue, without making unnecessary changes to the presentation.

children.name: Background color of slide 1 is changed to light blue
children.description: Checks if the background color of the first slide is set to a shade of light blue after the agent's action.

children.name: No extraneous changes to other slides
children.description: Checks that slides other than slide 1 have not had their backgrounds altered.

children.name: No extraneous non-background changes to slide 1
children.description: Checks that no other properties (content, layout, notes, transitions, animations) of slide 1 were modified except the background color.

metadata.task: Change the background color of the slide 1 to light blue.
